chunks.text: Guanghan Meng | EECS at UC Berkeley Guanghan Meng: Faculty Home Page Larger Photo Guanghan Meng Below The Line Assistant Professor Contact Information 485 Minor Hall tel: 510-642-2380 guanghan_meng@berkeley.edu Links Personal Homepage Biography I am a Tenure-Track Assistant Professor in the Herbert Wertheim School of Optometry and Vision Science and Department of Electrical Engineering and Computer Science (EECS) at the University of California, Berkeley. I am affiliated with Vision Science, Applied Science & Technology (AS&T) and Electrical Engineering and Computer Science (EECS) PhD programs. I lead the Visionary Optical Imaging LAb (VOILA). I apply methods of optical physics and modern computational science to develop cutting-edge optical microscopy technologies for eye and brain imaging. VOILA is a highly interdisciplinary team, welcoming people from a variety of backgrounds spanning physics, engineering, and biology. Education 2021, PhD, University of California Berkeley 2015, BE, Shanghai Jiao Tong University Research Areas Physical Electronics (PHY) Biosystems & Computational Biology (BIO) Artificial Intelligence (AI) Research Centers Berkeley Artificial Intelligence Research Lab (BAIR) Berkeley Center for Computational Imaging (BCCI)
